selections.name: Heart On A Run
selections.reason: Top Speed Rating (98) and Class Rating (92) in the field. Drops slightly in class and possesses back class from stakes attempts.

selections.name: Heat Commander
selections.reason: Won last start at this track/distance. Rail draw is advantageous for QH sprints.

selections.name: Jess Revvin It Up
selections.reason: Strong speed figure (93) and consistent form. Trouble line two back, bounced back well.

selections.name: Say Its Not So
selections.reason: Winner last time out. Improving form cycle.

danger_horse.name: Heat Commander
danger_horse.reason: Recent winner with the rail draw, dangerous if he breaks cleanly.

selections.name: Max's Maxine
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures (101) and solid recent form (2nd last out). Fits well at this level.

selections.name: Bango Gal
selections.reason: Highest speed figure (102) in the field. Won two starts back, excuse last time out.

selections.name: Miss Sundaze
selections.reason: Matches top speed figure. Competitive in this claiming rank.

selections.name: Royal Integrity
selections.reason: Consistent runner, finished 2nd last out. Rail draw helps tactical speed.

danger_horse.name: Bango Gal
danger_horse.reason: Speed figure matches top pick, dangerous if she clears early.

selections.name: Lanilla
selections.reason: Superior Class (105) dropping from MSW at Del Mar/Santa Anita. Speed (110) is elite for this field.

selections.name: Interplay
selections.reason: Highest raw speed figure (112). Finished 3rd last out, logical threat.

selections.name: Benster
selections.reason: Consistent speed (104) and form. Should be in the mix for minors.

selections.name: Silver Flirt
selections.reason: Solid speed figure, rail draw saves ground on the turf.

danger_horse.name: Interplay
danger_horse.reason: Owns the highest speed figure in the race, dangerous if top pick regresses.

selections.name: Fancy Dancer
selections.reason: Won last start in similar company. Good form cycle.

selections.name: Dekudylan
selections.reason: High speed figure (105). Finished 3rd recently, competitive here.

selections.name: Limited Heatwave
selections.reason: Highest speed figure (107) but aging (8yo). Drops in class, dangerous.

selections.name: K R Rules
selections.reason: Matches top speed figure. Wide draw but has the pace to overcome it.

danger_horse.name: Limited Heatwave
danger_horse.reason: Back class and top speed figures make him a threat on the drop.

selections.name: Every Third Day
selections.reason: BEST BET. The only horse with established form and a massive 107 speed figure. Ran 2nd in debut.

selections.name: State Forty Eight
selections.reason: First time starter with strong connections (Martinez/Americano). 5/2 ML suggests readiness.

selections.name: Looking For You
selections.reason: First time starter with solid trainer stats. Outside post is good for debut.

selections.name: Take The Rail
selections.reason: First time starter, watch tote board.

selections.name: Lexithea
selections.reason: GOLDEN GAP. Huge speed figure (114) in debut win. 9 points clear of next best. Looks dominant.

selections.name: Ready To Dare
selections.reason: Solid speed (105) and class. The logical alternative if the top pick bounces.

selections.name: Veronica's Delight
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures (104). Good for exotics.

selections.name: Big A's Little One
selections.reason: Speed fit (102), likely to be part of the pace scenario.

selections.name: Evanderkeen
selections.reason: Won last start beating key rivals here. Speed (106) is competitive.

selections.name: Ratleff
selections.reason: Finished 2nd to top pick last time. Matches speed figure. Revenge spot.

selections.name: Resultant
selections.reason: Highest speed figure (110) in the field. Finished 3rd last out, right in the mix.

selections.name: Golden Greek
selections.reason: High speed (108) and class. Consistent check earner.

danger_horse.name: Resultant
danger_horse.reason: Top speed figure indicates he can win if he gets the right trip.

selections.name: Shackleford Strong
selections.reason: Top speed figure (110). Finished 3rd last out, should improve here.

selections.name: Ronamo
selections.reason: Good recent form (2nd last out). Speed figure fits well.

selections.name: Xtreme Mayhem
selections.reason: Matches top speed figure (110). Wide draw is the concern but has talent.

selections.name: Magoo
selections.reason: Finished 2nd last out. Consistent type for lower rungs of exotics.

danger_horse.name: Xtreme Mayhem
danger_horse.reason: Fast enough to win but needs to overcome the outside post.
